message:
feat: Enable 272 MCP tools by default in agent mode

This change restores automatic MCP server loading that was previously
working by switching from opt-in to opt-out configuration.

Changes:
- Enable claude-flow-sdk MCP by default (9 in-SDK tools)
- Enable claude-flow MCP by default (101 tools)
- Enable flow-nexus MCP by default (162 tools)
- Enable agentic-payments MCP by default (9 tools)
- Total: 272 MCP tools automatically available

Technical Details:
- Changed environment variable checks from `=== 'true'` to `!== 'false'`
- Users can now opt-out by setting ENABLE_*_MCP=false
- Previous behavior required explicit ENABLE_*_MCP=true

Files Modified:
- src/agents/claudeAgent.ts (lines 127-172)
- package.json (version 1.2.6 -> 1.2.7)

Testing:
✅ All 272 MCP tools loading successfully
✅ agentic-payments: 9 tools
✅ claude-flow: 101 tools
✅ flow-nexus: 162 tools

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

   "main": "dist/index.js",
